title: Minecraft Rainbow
description: This modpack is a must-use modpack for playing with Rainbow's server, and it contains some mods with technical elements and better visuals mods.
body:
Minecraft Rainbow整合包
- 
![Rainbow's Server风景](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9ef87516bf3813dde315e61d9eb7b379beb75ba.jpeg)
描述
- 
此整合包是游玩Rainbow服务器必须使用的整合包，它在单人游戏中是可选的，所以您可根据个人喜好下载此整合包。

摘要
- 
整合包中添加了一些可以提升画质的光影、一些使游戏体验增加的模组（详见最新版本中的模组列表）以及最主要的科技模组“机械动力”，关于“机械动力”模组，请看[机械动力](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

如何安装？
- 
您可以在此页面下载整合包并上传至我的世界启动器安装，也可以直接在第三方启动器上下载安装整合包。

启动器？
- 
[Prism启动器](https://prismlauncher.org/)

问题？
- 
如果您有任何问题，请发送邮件到rainbow0603@outlook.com或liyushen1234@126.com！

关于Rainbow服务器？
- 
抱歉，Rainbow服务器暂时**不对外开放**。

Description
- 
This modpack is a must-use modpack for playing Rainbow's server and is optional for single player games, so you can download this modpack as you like.

The modpack adds some light and shaders to improve the picture quality, some mods to increase the game experience(See the list of mods in the latest version), and the main technology mod“Create”, about the “Create” mod, see [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

How To Install? 
- 
You can download the modpack and upload it to minecraft launcher installation from this page, or you can download and install the modpack directly from a third-party launcher.

Launcher?
- 
[Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/)

Questions?
- 
If you have any questions, please send an email to rainbow0603@outlook.com and liyushen1234@126.com!

About Rainbow's Server?
- 
Sorry,The Rainbow's server is **Closed to the public for the time being**.
